scope: bounded local GDELT live probe; no scheduler, MinIO, Ollama, Spark, or historical backfill
note: If status is failed, the public GDELT DOC API did not return a landable HTTP 200 body during this bounded probe.

failures.error: GDELT DOC API returned HTTP 429 during bounded probe after configured retry handling
RemoteDisconnected: remote end closed connection without response during bounded probe
